payload.answer: That request is too broad to store as a durable personal memory. Please choose a more specific AI-related fact, preference, project, goal, or instruction you want remembered.
repair_options: Store a specific AI preference, e.g. “I prefer practical AI explanations with examples.”
Store a specific AI project context, e.g. “I’m working on an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Store a specific AI learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn how transformers work.”
Store a specific tool preference, e.g. “I use Python and PyTorch for AI projects.”
Do not store anything from this request.
